## HashBranded variable

Zod schema for hashed values (SHA-256, bcrypt, etc.). Ensures a non-empty trimmed string up to 200 characters.

**Signature:**

```typescript
HashBranded: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Hash'>
```
